response:
## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** AddressAutocomplete.jsx **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Keyboard Motor (HIGH), Screen Reader Semantic (MEDIUM), Cognitive Neurodivergent (HIGH) **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification Reflow, Environmental Contrast, Vestibular Motion, Auditory Access --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 0 | | MAJOR | 3 | | MINOR | 1 | | ENHANCEMENT | 1 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None of the escalated perspectives passed all checklist items. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Front-End Dev** - **Suggestion items not keyboard focusable** — Keyboard Motor — MAJOR — 2.1.1 Keyboard Accessible - **Missing ARIA roles for suggestions list** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 1.3.1 Info and Relationships - **No live region for suggestion updates** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.3 Status Messages **Visual Design** - **Error message contrast ratio 3.5:1** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 1.4.3 Contrast Minimum **UX Design** - **Double-action Enter key (select + submit)** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MINOR — 3.2.2 On Input **Content Author** - **No reading level simplification** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — ENHANCEMENT — 3.1.5 Reading Level --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification None in this audit. --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Full Finding Details ``` **Finding:** Suggestion items are not keyboard focusable via Tab. Only arrow key navigation is implemented, but divs lack tabindex. **WCAG:** 2.1.1 Keyboard Accessible **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** Suggestion items use `onClick` but no `tabindex` or `role="option"` **Fix:** Add `role="option"` and `tabindex="0"` to suggestion items. Use `aria-selected` for highlighted item. ``` ``` **Finding:** Suggestions list lacks semantic container role. Screen readers cannot announce list structure or items. **WCAG:** 1.3.1 Info and Relationships **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** Suggestions rendered as `
` elements with no `role="list"`/`role="listitem"` **Fix:** Wrap suggestions in `
    ` and use `
  • ` for each item. ``` ``` **Finding:** No live region announces when suggestions appear/disappear. Screen reader users won't know list updates. **WCAG:** 4.1.3 Status Messages **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** Suggestions shown/hidden via `showSuggestions` state without `aria-live` **Fix:** Add `aria-live="polite"` to suggestions container and use `aria-atomic="true"` ``` ``` **Finding:** "No matching addresses found" text has 3.5:1 contrast ratio (black on #888). Fails 4.5:1 AA requirement. **WCAG:** 1.4.3 Contrast Minimum **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `.no-results` color: #888 on white background **Fix:** Increase contrast to 4.5:1 (e.g., #000 on #fff or #fff on #000) ``` ``` **Finding:** Enter key both selects a suggestion and submits the form. This creates unexpected double-action behavior. **WCAG:** 3.2.2 On Input **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `handleKeyDown` calls `formRef.current.submit()` on Enter **Fix:** Separate selection and submission actions with explicit "Select" and "Submit" buttons ``` ``` **Finding:** Form instructions use complex address format without plain language explanation. **WCAG:** 3.1.5 Reading Level **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** ENHANCEMENT **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** "123 Main Street, Philadelphia, PA 19103" format **Fix:** Add plain language explanation of address components ``` --- ## Technical Recommendations 1. **Keyboard Navigation** - Add `role="listbox"` to suggestions container - Add `role="option"` and `tabindex="0"` to each suggestion - Implement `aria-selected` for highlighted item - Add `aria-live="polite"` to suggestions container 2. **Screen Reader Semantics** - Replace `
    ` with `
      ` for suggestions - Add `aria-label` to suggestions list - Add `aria-live` region for dynamic updates - Add `aria-owns` to input field referencing suggestions list 3. **Cognitive Accessibility** - Increase error message contrast to 4.5:1 - Add "Select" button next to suggestions - Add plain language explanation of address format - Increase suggestion timeout from 800ms to 1.5s --- ## Code-Level Fixes ```jsx // In render method
      {suggestions.map((addr, i) => (
      handleSelect(addr)} > {addr}
      ))}
      ``` ```css .no-results { color: #000; /* 21:1 contrast */ } ``` ```jsx // In handleKeyDown } else if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); if (selectedIdx >= 0) { setQuery(suggestions[selectedIdx]); // Remove form submission from Enter key } ``` ```jsx // Add separate submit button ```
